# Git Commit Instructions

When generating Git commit messages from diffs:

- Always use the Conventional Commits format: <type>: <description>
- Allowed types: feat, style, refactor, docs, fix, chore
- Do not use any other types.
- Keep the overall message under 50 characters.
- Write the description in lowercase, present tense, and imperative mood
- Return strictly the raw commit message. Do not include markdown code blocks, quotes, introductions, or explanations.
